message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for files that should not be tracked:
- .fastembed_cache/ - ML model caches downloaded at runtime
- legacy/ - legacy reference files
- *.sqlite3.bak, *.sqlite3-wal.bak - database backup files
- *.sqlite3.corrupt-* - corrupt database recovery files
- tmp/, test_logs/ - temporary test artifacts

These patterns prevent accidental commits of large model caches,
database backups from crash recovery, and temporary test output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -44,3 +44,17 @@ crates/mcp-agent-mail-conformance/tests/conformance/python_reference/_scratch/
 
 # Legacy Python reference code (local-only, not part of Rust workspace)
 legacy_python_mcp_agent_mail_code/
+legacy/
+
+# FastEmbed model caches (downloaded at runtime)
+.fastembed_cache/
+**/.fastembed_cache/
+
+# Database backup and recovery files
+*.sqlite3.bak
+*.sqlite3-wal.bak
+*.sqlite3.corrupt-*
+
+# Temporary directories
+tmp/
+test_logs/
